HomePage.title: Harmonia
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Smart management system and advanced learning experience for music conservatories

HelpCenter.title: Harmonia Help Center
HelpCenter.subtitle: How can we help you today?

AvailableNow.title: Available Lessons for Today and Tomorrow
AvailableNow.subtitle: Find a music lesson at a special price! A one-time opportunity to learn from top teachers with a discount.
AvailableNow.noSlotsDesc: Try changing the filter options or check back later.

OpenDay.heroSubtitle: Come meet the teachers, try new instruments, and hear our students perform. A musical experience for the whole family!
OpenDay.featuresTitle: What awaits you at the Open Day?
OpenDay.feature1Desc: An opportunity to get to know our leading pedagogical team, ask questions, and receive personal guidance.
OpenDay.feature2Desc: Children can touch, feel, and play a variety of musical instruments with the guidance of our teachers.
OpenDay.feature3Desc: Watch our talented students showcase what they've learned in short concerts throughout the day.
OpenDay.formSubtitle: Book a personal introductory meeting. The number of spots is limited.
OpenDay.noSlots: All spots are taken. Try another date.
OpenDay.successDesc: Thank you for registering for the Open Day. A confirmation and further details have been sent to your email. We look forward to seeing you!
OpenDay.noOpenDays: There are currently no open days planned. Please check again soon!
OpenDay.noEventsForBranch: No open days found for this branch.

AdminOpenDay.title: Open Day Management
AdminOpenDay.subtitle: Track attendees and manage appointments for the Open Day event.

MusiciansForHire.heroSubtitle: All musicians from Harmonia - vetted, reliable, and fully insured.

features.experiencedDesc: Every musician is a professional teacher or advanced student from our conservatory.
features.backupDesc: If a musician cancels, we provide a replacement of equal or superior caliber, guaranteed.
features.professionalDesc: We handle all logistics, from booking to payment, for a seamless experience.

MusiciansForHire.occasionsSubtitle: From intimate ceremonies to large corporate events, we provide the perfect soundtrack.
MusiciansForHire.configuratorSubtitle: Configure your event needs and get a real-time price estimate instantly.
MusiciansForHire.musiciansSubtitle: A selection of our finest teachers and advanced students available for events.

DonatePage.heroTitle: Because music is not just for those who can afford it
DonatePage.heroSubtitle: Every donation, large or small, allows a talented child with financial difficulties to continue their musical journey. Together, we can give them a future.
DonatePage.storiesSubtitle: Behind every number is a story. Meet some of the students whose lives your donation can change.
DonatePage.story1Text: Maya comes from a single-parent family. The scholarship allows her to continue preparing for the Ministry of Education exams. Her teacher says she has real potential for a musical career.
DonatePage.story2Text: Yosef immigrated two years ago and faces integration challenges. Music is his refuge. Thanks to the scholarship, he can continue to play and develop his unique talent.
DonatePage.story3Text: Lian lives in the periphery, and access to quality lessons is limited. Your donation will allow her to continue attending lessons at the conservatory and fulfill her dream.
DonatePage.donateFormSubtitle: All donations are tax-deductible under Section 46. 100% of your donation goes directly to student scholarships.
DonatePage.help1: Funds two private lessons for a student.
DonatePage.help2: Covers almost a full month of studies.
DonatePage.help3: Funds an entire semester of music lessons.
DonatePage.dedicationPlaceholder: In honor of / In memory of...
DonatePage.anonymous: I prefer to remain anonymous (no receipt)

agents.matchmakerDesc: Automatically matches new students to the most suitable available teachers based on musical profile, goals, and availability.
agents.compositionSuggesterDesc: Suggests relevant compositions for repertoire based on student level, goals, and already selected pieces.
agents.rescheduleDesc: Automatically handles lesson cancellation and rescheduling requests via WhatsApp or chat.
agents.progressReportDesc: Generates initial drafts of periodic progress reports for teachers, based on practice logs and lesson notes.
agents.adminAlertsDesc: Continuously monitors the system and surfaces operational issues before they become crises.
agents.leadNurtureDesc: Performs automatic, personalized follow-ups with students who registered for a trial lesson but did not continue to a package.

Walkthrough.title: System Tour
Walkthrough.studentProfileDesc: Here you will find a summary of your activity, progress, and achievements.
Walkthrough.scheduleDesc: Here you can see your schedule, cancel or reschedule a lesson.
Walkthrough.practiceDesc: Update your teacher on your progress between lessons and log your practices.
Walkthrough.formsDesc: Submit forms for recitals, exams, and more, and track their approval status.
Walkthrough.messagesDesc: Send messages directly to your teacher from here.
Walkthrough.studentHelpDesc: For any question - click the help button! Our AI assistant is available 24/7.
Walkthrough.familyHubDesc: This is your control center - here you will see all your children in one place.
Walkthrough.childCardDesc: Here is a weekly summary of your child's activity. Click on 'Full Profile' to see all details.
Walkthrough.billingDesc: Here you will find invoices and can update payment methods.
Walkthrough.notificationsDesc: Choose how to receive updates - SMS, WhatsApp, or Email.
Walkthrough.weeklySummaryDesc: Additionally, every week you will receive an email summary of what happened in your children's lessons.
Walkthrough.parentHelpDesc: Have questions? Click on help at any time.
Walkthrough.teacherDashboardDesc: Welcome! This is your control center, with all the information you need for today.
Walkthrough.todayLessonsDesc: Here you can mark attendance for your students with a click.
Walkthrough.availabilityDesc: Set when you are available - students will see your availability and can book lessons.
Walkthrough.studentRosterDesc: View all your students and quickly access their full profile.
Walkthrough.teacherApprovalsDesc: Here forms submitted by students waiting for your approval will wait for you.
Walkthrough.sickLeaveDesc: If you are sick, click here - the system will cancel the lessons and notify everyone automatically.
Walkthrough.teacherHelpDesc: This tour is available again from settings. For more questions, use the AI assistant.
Walkthrough.adminDashboardDesc: Welcome! This is your control center for managing the conservatorium.
Walkthrough.keyMetricsDesc: Here you will see the most important data in real-time: active students, lessons, pending approvals, and AI alerts.
Walkthrough.aiAlertsDesc: The AI agent proactively identifies operational issues and alerts you here.
Walkthrough.userManagementDesc: Here you can approve join requests and manage all users.
Walkthrough.adminApprovalsDesc: Forms of all types awaiting your final approval are centralized here.
Walkthrough.masterScheduleDesc: View the schedule of all teachers and rooms at a glance.
Walkthrough.reportsDesc: Analyze the institution's performance with financial, operational, and academic reports.
Walkthrough.settingsDesc: From here you can manage all system settings, including pricing, AI agents, and more.

SlotPromotionCard.shareText: I found an available {instrument} lesson with {teacher} at a special price of ₪{price}!
SlotPromotionCard.linkCopiedDesc: You can now share it with friends.

ParentPayment.redirectSecurePaymentDesc: In practice, this window will open a secure PCI-DSS payment page.
ParentPayment.setupRecurringDesc: The recurring payment request (Tokens) was sent to Cardcom servers.
ParentPayment.payByTenth: Must be paid by the 10th of the month
ParentPayment.securityNotice: All payments are processed through CardCom, which complies with the strict PCI-DSS security standard. Credit card details are not saved in Harmony's systems.
ParentPayment.viewInvoices: View open invoices and payment history.

SickLeaveModal.title: Report Absence / Sick Leave
SickLeaveModal.description: Select the date range you will be unavailable. All scheduled lessons in these dates will be cancelled automatically.

SickLeaveModal.attentionDesc: This action will cancel all {count} lessons listed above. Students will be notified and given a makeup credit. This action cannot be undone.

AnnouncementComposer.title: Create Announcement
AnnouncementComposer.description: Fill in the details of the message you want to send.

placeholders.title: e.g., Reminder about Hanukkah break
placeholders.body: Write the announcement content here... Basic Markdown syntax is supported.

AnnouncementComposer.successDesc: The message "{title}" has been sent to the selected audience.

errors.titleMin: Title must contain at least 5 characters.
errors.bodyMin: Message body must contain at least 10 characters.
errors.minOneChannel: Must select at least one distribution channel.
